name: ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS 8 REMAKE
short_description: Theater of war, infinite drama. A masterpiece of historical simulation "ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS 8" is revived after 20 years. Enjoy the greatest military drama in the Three Kingdoms series, with the largest number of officers and scenarios!
detailed_description:
ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS 8 REMAKE: Destiny and Strategy Expansion Pack Bundle Steam Bonus

- ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS 8 REMAKE "ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS 14" Officer CG Portrait Set

- ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS 8 REMAKE EP "Romance of the Three Kingdoms Hadou" Officer CG Portrait Set 1
- ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS 8 REMAKE EP "Romance of the Three Kingdoms Hadou" Officer CG Portrait Set 2

Notes:
- The Steam® bonus items listed above will become available once you have purchased ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS 8 REMAKE: Destiny and Strategy Expansion Pack Bundle in the Steam® store.
- May become available for purchase or for free separately at a later date.
- The Steam® bonus ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS 8 REMAKE EP "Romance of the Three Kingdoms Hadou" Officer CG Portrait Set 1 and 2 will not be made available through the purchase of the base game ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS 8 REMAKE in the Steam® store.


ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS 8 REMAKE Steam Bonus

- "ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS XIV" Officer Graphics Set

Note: Purchasing "ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS 8 REMAKE" from the Steam® store will activate the store bonus "ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS XIV" Officer Graphics Set.
Note: May become available for purchase or for free separately at a later date.


“ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS 8 REMAKE Digital Deluxe Edition” Contents


- The main game
- Special Digital Artbook
- Digital Soundtrack
- Bonus scenario "Liu Bei's Three Tacticians"

Note: The Special Digital Artbook and Digital Soundtrack will be made available via the game’s Gallery menu.
Note: These contents cannot be downloaded as separate files (PDF, MP3, etc.).
Note: The Special Digital Artbook will be the Japanese version.
Note: None of these contents can be viewed or played outside of the game.
Note: “ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS 8 REMAKE” is also available for purchase on its own. Please avoid making redundant purchases.


About the Game

ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS 8 REMAKE: Destiny and Strategy Expansion Pack Bundle

Note: This bundle includes the products ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS 8 REMAKE and ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS 8 REMAKE: Destiny and Strategy Expansion Pack. If you have already purchased ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS 8 REMAKE, please purchase ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS 8 REMAKE: Destiny and Strategy Expansion Pack instead of this bundle to avoid making duplicate purchases.


A boundless Three Kingdoms experience.

To celebrate the series' 40th anniversary, we have improved the quality of and added new content to the "Play as All Officers" feature of ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS 8 REMAKE, which allows you to play as any officer in the world of the Three Kingdoms. Enjoy the game to the fullest with new elements like Turning Points and Gems, new events, and a new Chinese voice option.

• Turmoil and tension abound in the new Turning Point system.

Experience new gameplay through various Turning Points, each with their own far-reaching effects. You will need to predict which Turning Points are likely to occur and employ appropriate strategies to work alongside or counter them.

• Gems based on status and reputation result in a variety of play styles.

Enable a range of possible actions through different Gem types based on your current status. You will have to consider each Gem's effects to decide which to unlock and use for your officer's development.

• New features and data make it easier to customize your play experience.

We have added the highly requested Chinese voice option and made all cutscenes fully voiced. We have also enhanced the data for Traits, historical events, and Official Titles, and have implemented in-game editing and Registered Specialties features.

ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS 8 REMAKE

Theater of war, infinite drama.
A masterpiece of historical simulation "ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS 8" is revived after 20 years.
This version includes an improved "All Officers Play" feature, which allows players to play as any officer in the world of the Three Kingdoms.
The game is also packed with additional elements that bring the officers to life, such as "Destiny" which can dramatically change the course of events and "Tales" which offer a variety of stories to choose from.
Combining 2D and 3D technologies, the game features both new and nostalgic visual effects, as well as many new officer graphics created specifically for this title.
Enjoy the greatest military drama in the Three Kingdoms series, with the largest number of officers and scenarios!

■Every officer can be the hero! The "All Officers Play" of ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS VIII returns.

More than 55 scenarios spanning over 80 years and featuring the largest number of officers in the series, from rulers to free officers. Play through a vast, deep, and turbulent Three Kingdoms period as you choose.

■Vivid depiction of the drama between officers. A variety of fascinating new features!

Many new features have been added to portray a variety of human dramas, such as "Tales" in which players can choose which events unfold. In addition, you can be linked by "Destiny" with other officers, and gain special relationships.
The relationship or "Links Forged" between each officer greatly affects how the gameplay unfolds. Changes in that relationship can be ascertained from the "Relationship Chart".

■Graphical enhancements.

In addition to newly drawn officer graphics, the scenic beauty of the game is depicted using ink paintings, combining 2D visuals and 3D depth to create a beautiful visual experience of the world of the Three Kingdoms.

supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese, Japanese*, Korean
*languages with full audio support
